title: Inner Entity
text: Inner Entity An Inner Entity is a Component Entity that has a parent Component Entity. It is used in the data structure of the component, which determines the access path to the data and the default component processing order and behavior. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: ent Main Development Object? No Part of: Component Entity ( Outer Entity ) Contains: Inner Entity , Component Field , Label , Property , Code Container Generalization: Component Entity Specializations: Up Entity , Down Entity Compilation Output: — Specialization Inner Entity specializes Component Entity in that it has a Component Entity as parent.
